Scope of Work
Application will have a Splash Screen.
User can register with email.
User can login with their credentials.
User can use forgot password to regain access.
"User can add the about details of Height, Weight, Fitness Level, Birth Day, Location."
"User can choose the location service, to give access to location."
User can choose to do Health Sync to fetch health kit info.
"Once entered Application will have the bottom bar of Work, Fitness, Activity, Reward Profile."
"Application will have the side menu of Dashboard, Home, Reminder, Point, LeaderBoard, Challenges, Statistics, Feedback , Contact Us, Settings."
Dashboard
"User can view the dashboard to view, the graph of steps taken"
User can also view the pie graph of points collected and points to go.
"A ticker which will show the news and important information about the user like check in, friends, points. Etc."


Home
"User can view the home page to view the blogs, events, polls pics/video, Fitness Activities, Checking, Reward Badges."
User can view all the posts by the user whom they are following or the events in which they are invited.
User can filter/sort the feed.

rd Badges."
User can view all the posts by the user whom they are following or the events in which they are invited.
User can filter/sort the feed.
Start A Run
User can choose to start the audio and choose the option of Run and start the pedometer to calculate the steps.
Automatically shift to cycle if the speed is more than average running speed
User will be able to see their start location and be able to change that in the map.
User can pause and stop the run.
"Once they start running they will be able to see live stats like distance, time and average speed."
User can view the map to view the directions and details of run.
User will be able to receive notification about any rewards they have earned by doing any activity.
"User can view the distance covered, time taken and average pace."
"User will be able to share the run on Facebook, twitter, instagram and linked in."
User can add photo

Inspire Me
In this section user will be able to all the motivational content coming from the backend.
"Content can be a video, audio, text or image."
User will be able to select any of the content to see the details.
User will be able to see details of any of the comment and be able to see comments posted on that content.
User will be able to post comments on any of the post.
"User will be able to share the content on Facebook, twitter, linkedin and instagram."
User will be able to add any content on to their favorite and be able to access then easily.
User can see list of all of their favorite content and be able to remove any content anytime.
"User can filter by company, events, Business, Wellness, Fitness category."
"User can sort the content by popularity, Latest. My Fav, Company Events"
Groups (Premium only)
User can view the Groups List.
"User can add a new group by adding the name, image, description and participant."
User can select any group to view all the participants and has option to follow.
User can select any user to view their time line.
There will be Maximum 5 groups per user

Group Chat
Users in the group can do group chat.
User can share the image in the group chat.

Events
Organisation Admin can create events which are seen by the employees
Engage can create events which are seen by all users
Application will Link to Calendar when accepted
can Go or maybe go or decline to attend
Fitness
"User can choose between steps points, checkins, Challenges"
Steps info will be fetched from Health Kit and GoogleFit.
User can select the checkins to view all the events .
User can select any event to view the details and has option to check in.
Checkin (Events and Facilities)
User can view all the checkins made by the user.
User can create a new checkin.
User can delete any checkin posted.
Reminders
"User can view all the reminders added in work, Fitness, Water."
User can view the reminder list.
User can manage their reminder and delete

a new checkin.
User can delete any checkin posted.
Reminders
"User can view all the reminders added in work, Fitness, Water."
User can view the reminder list.
User can manage their reminder and delete it.
User can sync it with the device calendar.
Leaderboard
User can view the list of friends/colleagues added.
User can view the leaderboard based on the points received for completing the actions.
Challenges
User can view all the challenges posted by Admin.
The challenges will be based on completing particular workout with defined distance for a fixed period of time and reward points to be earned for completing the challenge.
User can accept the challenge.
User can view all the participant added and their progress.
Users can also make 4 challenges and invite their friends or colleagues to the challenge
(These 4 challenges can only be as per the pre set challenges where we assume the tracking of challenge completion will be manual confirmation except steps)

Profile
User can view their profile an edit basic details.
"User can view the stats of steps, checkins, points,"
User can view all the reminders added.
"User can connect via Twitter, Facebook and Healthkit/GoogleFit."

ofile an edit basic details.

"User can connect to Fitbit or any similar wearable (only one), API’s will be shared by the client. Any new hardware integration will be taken as new request and cost will be shared accordingly."
Rewards
User will get points of the following activities
Accept event
Invite a friend
Sharing a post
Take part in poll
Comment on Post
Publish video or video
check in to facility or event.
Completing challenge
Sharing on social media.
on every 1000 steps completed
"Based on the points, user will get rewards decided in 3 categories Active, Energetic, Athletic."
Awards can vary based on user’s country/state.
User can view all the rewards in a list.
User can select any reward to view the details.
User can filter and sort the reward list.
User can redeem the reward and view the coupon code.
Couipon to be saved in the form of a card
Coupon code will be saved with in the app.
Once viewed a message is sent to the admin about the reward
User can remove manually coupon
